hero.title: GameOverse Wiki
hero.description: GameOverse is a GLITCH animated series about collapsing video game worlds, strange heroes, dangerous villains, and the rules behind saving every world.

gameOverseReleaseDateWatchGuide.title: GameOverse Release Date and Watch Guide
gameOverseReleaseDateWatchGuide.intro: GameOverse Pilot released on May 15, 2026. Use this guide to start from official channels and watch in the correct order.

gameOverseCharactersAndVoiceCast.title: GameOverse Characters and Voice Cast
gameOverseCharactersAndVoiceCast.intro: This module covers key GameOverse names with role and cast context for quick lookup.

items.name: Kit Bodega
items.description: Primary protagonist driving Farcade missions across unstable game worlds.

items.name: Kaboodle
items.description: Kit’s robot companion and tactical support during world-transition encounters.

items.name: Gobbles
items.description: Survivor from a collapsing world who joins the central team arc.

items.name: Warrick
items.description: Commands Syntax operations that push worlds toward destructive win states.

items.name: Miss Information
items.description: Intel-focused operator assisting Syntax field progression.

items.name: Fold
items.description: Navigation and control specialist supporting Warrick’s plans.

gameOverseStoryAndPremiseExplained.title: GameOverse Story and Premise Explained
gameOverseStoryAndPremiseExplained.intro: GameOverse flips standard game logic: a hero victory can trigger world destruction.

solutions.name: Core Rule
solutions.description: If a game reaches its final win condition, the world may collapse instead of stabilizing.

solutions.name: Farcade Objective
solutions.description: Kit’s side tries to prevent terminal win states and keep worlds alive.

solutions.name: Syntax Objective
solutions.description: Warrick’s side accelerates hero progress and exploits destroyed worlds.

solutions.name: Pilot Conflict
solutions.description: The pilot stages repeated race conditions between protection and completion.

managementTips: Focus on faction goals first, then character actions.
Use this module before diving into lore details.
Track each world by its win-condition risk level.

cards.name: Rule Implications

cards.name: Faction Escalation

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about GameOverse

questions.question: GameOverse: Is GameOverse a singleplayer game?
questions.answer: Yes. GameOverse is a singleplayer-only game with no multiplayer or co-op planned.

questions.question: GameOverse: What is the Apotheosis system in GameOverse?
questions.answer: Apotheosis is GameOverse' freeform fusion crafting system. Instead of following fixed recipes, you combine materials and discover your own crafting paths.

questions.question: GameOverse: Where can I play GameOverse?
questions.answer: GameOverse is currently available on Steam for Windows. Linux and Steam Deck support is available through Proton 9.0.

questions.question: GameOverse: How much does GameOverse cost?
GameOverse: Does GameOverse support controllers?
questions.answer: Yes, but controller play is not recommended because the menus are not designed around it. Keyboard and mouse is the smoother option.

questions.question: GameOverse: Will GameOverse receive updates?
questions.answer: Yes. Some content updates are planned after release, but they are not intended to continue on an indefinite regular schedule.
